---
title: "Integrative RNA-seq / small RNA-seq analysis (mRNA & miRNA) in mice"
author: "Léa Dubelloy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# ============================================================
# 1. GENERAL SETUP
# ============================================================

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# --- Packages ---
library(tidyverse)        # dplyr, ggplot2, tidyr, stringr, etc.
library(ggrepel)          # Volcano plot labels
library(ggvenn)           # Venn diagrams
library(pheatmap)         # Heatmap
library(scales)           # Axis formatting
library(clusterProfiler)  # GO / KEGG / GSEA enrichment
library(org.Mm.eg.db)     # Mus musculus annotations
library(multiMiR)         # Validated miRNA/mRNA integration
library(openxlsx)         # Excel export

# --- Global thresholds ---
LFC  <- log2(1.5)  # = 0.585
PADJ <- 0.05       # adjusted p-value (mRNA)
PVAL <- 0.05       # raw p-value (miRNA)

# --- ggplot options ---
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
options(scipen = 999)
```

# ============================================================
# 2. DATA LOADING & PREPARATION
# ============================================================

```{r chargement}
# Cleaning function: commas -> dots
clean_num <- function(df, cols) {
  df %>% mutate(across(all_of(cols), ~ as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", .))))
}

# --- mRNA ---
cigar_df <- read.csv("CIGAR vs CTRL2 ARNm.csv") %>%
  clean_num(c("log2FoldChange", "padj", "baseMean", "pvalue"))

tabac_df <- read.csv("TABAC vs CTRL1 ARNm.csv") %>%
  clean_num(c("log2FoldChange", "padj", "baseMean", "pvalue"))

# --- miRNA ---
cigar_mi <- read.csv("CIGAR vs CTRL2 miARN.csv") %>%
  clean_num(c("log2FoldChange", "pvalue", "padj"))

tabac_mi <- read.csv("TABAC vs CTRL1 miARN.csv") %>%
  clean_num(c("log2FoldChange", "pvalue", "padj"))

cat("mRNA Cigarette :", nrow(cigar_df), "lignes\n")
cat("mRNA Tobacco    :", nrow(tabac_df), "lignes\n")
cat("miRNA Cigarette:", nrow(cigar_mi), "lignes\n")
cat("miRNA Tobacco   :", nrow(tabac_mi), "lignes\n")
cat("\nNA padj ARNm - Cigarette :", sum(is.na(cigar_df$padj)), "\n")
cat("NA padj mRNA - Tobacco    :", sum(is.na(tabac_df$padj)), "\n")
```

# ============================================================
# 3. FILTERING OF DYSREGULATED GENES AND miRNAs
# ============================================================

```{r filtrage_arnm}
# --- mRNA: threshold padj < 0.05 & |log2FC| >= log2(1.5) ---
ajouter_regulation_arnm <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(
    regulation = case_when(
      padj < PADJ & log2FoldChange >=  LFC ~ "UP",
      padj < PADJ & log2FoldChange <= -LFC ~ "DOWN",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )
  )
}

cigar_df <- ajouter_regulation_arnm(cigar_df)
tabac_df <- ajouter_regulation_arnm(tabac_df)

# geneID lists by group (ENSEMBL)
cigar_up   <- cigar_df %>% filter(regulation == "UP")   %>% pull(geneID)
cigar_down <- cigar_df %>% filter(regulation == "DOWN") %>% pull(geneID)
tabac_up   <- tabac_df %>% filter(regulation == "UP")   %>% pull(geneID)
tabac_down <- tabac_df %>% filter(regulation == "DOWN") %>% pull(geneID)

# Common genes
communs_up         <- intersect(cigar_up,   tabac_up)
communs_down       <- intersect(cigar_down, tabac_down)
genes_communs_tous <- intersect(union(cigar_up, cigar_down), union(tabac_up, tabac_down))
gene_divergent     <- setdiff(genes_communs_tous, c(communs_up, communs_down))

cat("Significant mRNA - Cigarette :", length(cigar_up) + length(cigar_down),
    "(", length(cigar_up), "UP /", length(cigar_down), "DOWN)\n")
cat("Significant mRNA - Tobacco    :", length(tabac_up) + length(tabac_down),
    "(", length(tabac_up), "UP /", length(tabac_down), "DOWN)\n")
cat("Common mRNA (all)    :", length(genes_communs_tous), "\n")
cat("  of which UP/UP      :", length(communs_up), "\n")
cat("  of which DOWN/DOWN  :", length(communs_down), "\n")
cat("  of which opposite   :", length(gene_divergent), "->", gene_divergent, "\n")
```

```{r filtrage_mirna}
# --- miRNA: RAW p-value < 0.05 & |log2FC| >= log2(1.5) ---
# Justification: no significant miRNA after BH correction (padj ~0.987 heated tobacco),
# raw p-value used for both conditions to allow consistent comparative analysis.

ajouter_regulation_mirna <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(
    regulation = case_when(
      pvalue < PVAL & log2FoldChange >=  LFC ~ "Upregulated",
      pvalue < PVAL & log2FoldChange <= -LFC ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )
  )
}

cigar_mi <- ajouter_regulation_mirna(cigar_mi)
tabac_mi <- ajouter_regulation_mirna(tabac_mi)

sig_cigar_mi <- cigar_mi %>% filter(regulation != "NS")
sig_tabac_mi <- tabac_mi %>% filter(regulation != "NS")
mi_communs   <- intersect(sig_cigar_mi$geneID, sig_tabac_mi$geneID)

cat("Significant miRNA - Cigarette :", nrow(sig_cigar_mi),
    "(", sum(sig_cigar_mi$regulation == "Upregulated"), "UP /",
    sum(sig_cigar_mi$regulation == "Downregulated"), "DOWN)\n")
cat("Significant miRNA - Tobacco    :", nrow(sig_tabac_mi),
    "(", sum(sig_tabac_mi$regulation == "Upregulated"), "UP /",
    sum(sig_tabac_mi$regulation == "Downregulated"), "DOWN)\n")
cat("Common miRNA        :", length(mi_communs), "->", mi_communs, "\n")
```

# ============================================================
# 4. mRNA VISUALIZATION
# ============================================================

```{r volcano_arnm}
# Generic mRNA volcano plot function
plot_volcano_arnm <- function(df, titre, top_n = 10) {
  top_labels <- df %>%
    filter(regulation != "NS") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(top_n) %>%
    pull(symbol)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = regulation)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1.5) +
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = ifelse(symbol %in% top_labels, symbol, "")),
      max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE,
      box.padding = 0.5, fontface = "italic"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("DOWN" = "#377EB8", "NS" = "grey60", "UP" = "#E41A1C"),
      labels = c("DOWN" = "Downregulated", "NS" = "Non-significant", "UP" = "Upregulated"),
      name = "Regulation"
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-LFC, LFC), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(PADJ), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    labs(title    = titre,
         subtitle = paste0("Thresholds: padj < ", PADJ, " ; |FC| > 1.5"),
         x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(padj)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}

p_volcano_cigar <- plot_volcano_arnm(cigar_df, "mRNA Volcano Plot: Cigarette vs Control")
p_volcano_tabac <- plot_volcano_arnm(tabac_df, "mRNA Volcano Plot: Heated Tobacco vs Control")

print(p_volcano_cigar)
ggsave("Volcano_ARNm_Cigarette.png", plot = p_volcano_cigar, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

print(p_volcano_tabac)
ggsave("Volcano_ARNm_Tabac_Chauffe.png", plot = p_volcano_tabac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r ma_plots}
# Generic MA plot function
plot_ma <- function(df, titre) {
  n_up   <- sum(df$regulation == "UP",   na.rm = TRUE)
  n_down <- sum(df$regulation == "DOWN", na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = baseMean, y = log2FoldChange, color = regulation)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
    scale_x_log10(
      labels = scales::comma,
      breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("UP" = "#E41A1C", "DOWN" = "#377EB8", "NS" = "grey60"),
      labels = c("UP" = "Upregulated", "DOWN" = "Downregulated", "NS" = "Non-significant"),
      name = "Regulation"
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-LFC, LFC), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0,            linetype = "solid",  color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
    labs(title    = titre,
         subtitle = paste0("Thresholds: padj < ", PADJ, " and |FC| > 1.5"),
         x = "Mean Expression (baseMean)", y = "Log2 Fold Change") +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}

p_ma_cigar <- plot_ma(cigar_df, "MA Plot: Cigarette vs Control")
p_ma_tabac <- plot_ma(tabac_df, "MA Plot: Heated Tobacco vs Control")

print(p_ma_cigar)
ggsave("MA_Plot_Cigarette.png", plot = p_ma_cigar, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

print(p_ma_tabac)
ggsave("MA_Plot_Tabac_Chauffe.png", plot = p_ma_tabac, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r venn_arnm}
# Venn diagrams mRNA — Global, UP, DOWN
cigar_all_ids  <- union(cigar_up, cigar_down)
tabac_all_ids  <- union(tabac_up, tabac_down)

style_venn <- list(stroke_size = 0.5, set_name_size = 4,
                   text_size = 4, show_percentage = FALSE)

make_venn <- function(liste, couleurs, titre, sous_titre) {
  ggvenn(liste,
         fill_color      = couleurs,
         stroke_size     = style_venn$stroke_size,
         set_name_size   = style_venn$set_name_size,
         text_size       = style_venn$text_size,
         show_percentage = style_venn$show_percentage) +
    labs(title = titre, subtitle = sous_titre) +
    theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
}

p_venn_global <- make_venn(
  list(Cigarette = cigar_all_ids, `Heated tobacco` = tabac_all_ids),
  c("#4DAF4A", "#984EA3"),
  "Venn Diagram of dysregulated mRNAs (global)",
  "Thresholds: padj < 0.05 ; |FC| > 1.5"
)
p_venn_up <- make_venn(
  list(Cigarette = cigar_up, `Heated tobacco` = tabac_up),
  c("firebrick2", "firebrick2"),
  "Upregulated mRNAs",
  "Thresholds: padj < 0.05 ; FC > 1.5"
)
p_venn_down <- make_venn(
  list(Cigarette = cigar_down, `Heated tobacco` = tabac_down),
  c("#337ab7", "#337ab7"),
  "Downregulated mRNAs",
  "Thresholds: padj < 0.05 ; FC < -1.5"
)

print(p_venn_global)
ggsave("Venn_ARNm_Global.png", plot = p_venn_global, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
print(p_venn_up)
ggsave("Venn_ARNm_UP.png",     plot = p_venn_up,     width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
print(p_venn_down)
ggsave("Venn_ARNm_DOWN.png",   plot = p_venn_down,   width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r heatmap_communs}
# Heatmap of the 41 common mRNAs
merged_communs <- merge(
  cigar_df %>% filter(geneID %in% genes_communs_tous) %>% dplyr::select(geneID, log2FoldChange),
  tabac_df %>% filter(geneID %in% genes_communs_tous) %>% dplyr::select(geneID, log2FoldChange),
  by = "geneID", suffixes = c("_CIGAR", "_TABAC")
) %>%
  distinct(geneID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(geneID != "" & !is.na(geneID))

rownames(merged_communs) <- merged_communs$geneID
heatmap_matrix <- as.matrix(merged_communs[, c("log2FoldChange_CIGAR", "log2FoldChange_TABAC")])

cat("Number of genes in heatmap :", nrow(heatmap_matrix), "\n")

# Display
pheatmap(heatmap_matrix,
         main         = "Common signature (41 mRNAs): Cigarette vs Heated tobacco",
         color        = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
         cluster_cols = FALSE, cluster_rows = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 5, fontsize_col = 10,
         cellwidth = 40, border_color = NA, angle_col = 45)

# Enregistrement
pheatmap(heatmap_matrix,
         main         = "Common signature (41 mRNAs): Cigarette vs Heated tobacco",
         color        = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
         cluster_cols = FALSE, cluster_rows = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 5, fontsize_col = 10,
         cellwidth = 40, border_color = NA, angle_col = 45,
         filename = "Heatmap_Signature_Commune.png", width = 7, height = 10)
```

# ============================================================
# 5. miRNA VISUALIZATION
# ============================================================

```{r volcano_mirna}
# Generic miRNA volcano plot function (raw p-value)
plot_volcano_mirna <- function(df, sig_df, titre, top_n = 3) {
  top_labels <- sig_df %>% arrange(pvalue) %>% head(top_n) %>% pull(geneID)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(pvalue), color = regulation)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1.5) +
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = ifelse(geneID %in% top_labels, geneID, "")),
      max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE,
      box.padding = 0.5, fontface = "italic"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Downregulated"    = "#377EB8",
                 "NS"               = "grey60",
                 "Upregulated"      = "#E41A1C"),
      labels = c("Downregulated"    = "Downregulated",
                 "NS"               = "Non-significant",
                 "Upregulated"      = "Upregulated"),
      name = "Regulation"
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-LFC, LFC), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(PVAL), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    labs(title    = titre,
         subtitle = paste0("Thresholds: raw p-value < ", PVAL, " ; |FC| > 1.5"),
         x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}

p_volcano_cigar_mi <- plot_volcano_mirna(cigar_mi, sig_cigar_mi, "miRNA Volcano Plot: Cigarette")
p_volcano_tabac_mi <- plot_volcano_mirna(tabac_mi, sig_tabac_mi, "miRNA Volcano Plot: Heated Tobacco")

print(p_volcano_cigar_mi)
ggsave("Volcano_miARN_Cigarette.png", plot = p_volcano_cigar_mi, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

print(p_volcano_tabac_mi)
ggsave("Volcano_miARN_Tabac_Chauffe.png", plot = p_volcano_tabac_mi, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r pie_charts_mirna}
# Generic miRNA pie chart function
plot_pie_mirna <- function(sig_df, condition_name) {
  df_counts <- sig_df %>%
    mutate(Status = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "Up", "Down")) %>%
    group_by(Status) %>%
    summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1))

  ggplot(df_counts, aes(x = "", y = Count, fill = Status)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
    coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
    theme_void() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Down" = "#3498db", "Up" = "#e74c3c"),
                      name = "Expression") +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Count, " (", Percentage, "%)")),
              position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
              color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    labs(title    = "Distribution of dysregulated miRNAs",
         subtitle = paste0("Condition: ", condition_name,
                           " (Total = ", sum(df_counts$Count), ")")) +
    theme(plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11))
}

p_pie_cigar <- plot_pie_mirna(sig_cigar_mi, "Cigarette")
p_pie_tabac <- plot_pie_mirna(sig_tabac_mi, "Heated tobacco")

print(p_pie_cigar)
ggsave("PieChart_miARN_Cigarette.png", plot = p_pie_cigar, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 300)

print(p_pie_tabac)
ggsave("PieChart_miARN_Tabac_Chauffe.png", plot = p_pie_tabac, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r venn_mirna}
# Venn diagram miRNA
p_venn_mirna <- make_venn(
  list(Cigarette = sig_cigar_mi$geneID, `Heated tobacco` = sig_tabac_mi$geneID),
  c("#4DAF4A", "#984EA3"),
  "Venn Diagram of dysregulated miRNAs",
  "Thresholds: raw p-value < 0.05 ; |FC| > 1.5"
)

print(p_venn_mirna)
ggsave("Venn_miARN.png", plot = p_venn_mirna, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r barplot_mirna_commun}
# Barplot of the common miRNA (mmu-miR-135b-5p) — opposite regulation between conditions
if (length(mi_communs) > 0) {
  val_cigar <- sig_cigar_mi %>% filter(geneID == mi_communs[1]) %>% pull(log2FoldChange)
  val_tabac <- sig_tabac_mi %>% filter(geneID == mi_communs[1]) %>% pull(log2FoldChange)

  df_commun_mi <- data.frame(
    Condition = c("Cigarette", "Heated tobacco"),
    Log2FC    = c(val_cigar, val_tabac)
  )

  p_commun_mi <- ggplot(df_commun_mi, aes(x = Condition, y = Log2FC, fill = Condition)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Log2FC, 2)), vjust = -0.5, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cigarette" = "#e74c3c", "Heated tobacco" = "#f39c12")) +
    labs(title    = paste("Log2FC :", mi_communs[1]),
         subtitle = "Sole common miRNA between both conditions (opposite regulation)",
         x = "", y = "Log2 Fold Change") +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

  print(p_commun_mi)
  ggsave(paste0("Barplot_miARN_commun_", mi_communs[1], ".png"),
         plot = p_commun_mi, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}
```

# ============================================================
# 6. FUNCTIONAL ENRICHMENT
# ============================================================

```{r go_bp_ora}
# Generic GO:BP ORA function (via ENSEMBL geneID)
run_go_ora <- function(gene_ids, label) {
  ego <- enrichGO(
    gene          = gene_ids,
    OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
    keyType       = "ENSEMBL",
    ont           = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
    readable      = TRUE
  )
  if (!is.null(ego) && nrow(ego) > 0) {
    p <- dotplot(ego, showCategory = 15) +
      ggtitle(paste("GO:BP ORA —", label)) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    return(list(plot = p, result = as.data.frame(ego)))
  } else {
    message("No significant enrichment for: ", label)
    return(NULL)
  }
}

go_communs    <- run_go_ora(genes_communs_tous, "Common genes (41)")
go_cigar_up   <- run_go_ora(cigar_up,           "Cigarette — UP")
go_cigar_down <- run_go_ora(cigar_down,          "Cigarette — DOWN")
go_tabac_up   <- run_go_ora(tabac_up,            "Heated tobacco — UP")
go_tabac_down <- run_go_ora(tabac_down,           "Heated tobacco — DOWN")

for (res in list(
  list(go_communs,    "GO_Communs.png"),
  list(go_cigar_up,   "GO_Cigarette_UP.png"),
  list(go_cigar_down, "GO_Cigarette_DOWN.png"),
  list(go_tabac_up,   "GO_Tabac_UP.png"),
  list(go_tabac_down, "GO_Tabac_DOWN.png")
)) {
  if (!is.null(res[[1]])) {
    print(res[[1]]$plot)
    ggsave(res[[2]], plot = res[[1]]$plot, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  }
}
```

```{r kegg_ora}
# Generic KEGG ORA function (ENSEMBL -> EntrezID conversion)
run_kegg <- function(gene_ids, label, barplot = FALSE) {
  ids <- bitr(gene_ids, fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db)
  kk  <- enrichKEGG(gene = ids$ENTREZID, organism = "mmu",
                    pvalueCutoff = 0.05, pAdjustMethod = "BH")
  if (!is.null(kk) && nrow(kk) > 0) {
    if (barplot) {
      p <- barplot(kk, showCategory = 10, label_format = 80) +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E41A1C", high = "#377EB8", name = "P-adj") +
        labs(title = paste("KEGG —", label), x = "Gene count") +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    } else {
      p <- dotplot(kk, showCategory = 10) +
        ggtitle(paste("KEGG —", label)) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    }
    return(list(plot = p, result = as.data.frame(kk)))
  } else {
    message("No significant KEGG enrichment for: ", label)
    return(NULL)
  }
}

kegg_communs    <- run_kegg(genes_communs_tous, "Common genes (41)", barplot = TRUE)
kegg_cigar_up   <- run_kegg(cigar_up,           "Cigarette — UP")
kegg_cigar_down <- run_kegg(cigar_down,          "Cigarette — DOWN")
kegg_tabac_up   <- run_kegg(tabac_up,            "Heated tobacco — UP")
kegg_tabac_down <- run_kegg(tabac_down,           "Heated tobacco — DOWN")

for (res in list(
  list(kegg_communs,    "KEGG_Communs.png"),
  list(kegg_cigar_up,   "KEGG_Cigarette_UP.png"),
  list(kegg_cigar_down, "KEGG_Cigarette_DOWN.png"),
  list(kegg_tabac_up,   "KEGG_Tabac_UP.png"),
  list(kegg_tabac_down, "KEGG_Tabac_DOWN.png")
)) {
  if (!is.null(res[[1]])) {
    print(res[[1]]$plot)
    ggsave(res[[2]], plot = res[[1]]$plot, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  }
}
```

```{r gsea}
# Generic GSEA GO:BP function (via ENSEMBL geneID)
run_gsea <- function(df, label) {
  gene_list <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(geneID) & geneID != "") %>%
    group_by(geneID) %>%
    summarise(log2FoldChange = mean(log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FoldChange)) %>%
    { setNames(.$log2FoldChange, .$geneID) }

  gse <- gseGO(geneList      = gene_list,
               OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
               keyType       = "ENSEMBL",
               ont           = "BP",
               pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "BH")

  # Conversion ENSEMBL -> symboles pour les plots
  gse <- setReadable(gse, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENSEMBL")

  if (nrow(gse) > 0) {
    p <- dotplot(gse, showCategory = 15, split = ".sign") +
      facet_grid(.~.sign,
                 labeller = as_labeller(c("activated" = "Activation",
                                          "suppressed" = "Inhibition"))) +
      scale_fill_continuous(low = "#377EB8", high = "#E41A1C", name = "p-adj") +
      scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 40)) +
      labs(title    = paste("GSEA GO:BP —", label),
           subtitle = "Activated and inhibited pathways") +
      theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
            plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
            panel.spacing    = unit(2, "lines"),
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = "white"),
            strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
            axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 8))
    return(list(plot = p, result = as.data.frame(gse)))
  } else {
    message("No significant GSEA result for: ", label)
    return(NULL)
  }
}

gsea_cigar <- run_gsea(cigar_df, "Cigarette")
gsea_tabac <- run_gsea(tabac_df, "Heated tobacco")

if (!is.null(gsea_cigar)) {
  print(gsea_cigar$plot)
  ggsave("GSEA_Cigarette.png", plot = gsea_cigar$plot, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
}
if (!is.null(gsea_tabac)) {
  print(gsea_tabac$plot)
  ggsave("GSEA_Tabac_Chauffe.png", plot = gsea_tabac$plot, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
}
```

# ============================================================
# 7a. miRNA / mRNA INTEGRATION (multiMiR)
# ============================================================

```{r extraction_listes_integration}
# miRNA UP x mRNA DOWN (canonical repression)
cigar_mir_up    <- sig_cigar_mi %>% filter(regulation == "Upregulated")   %>% pull(geneID)
cigar_mrna_down <- cigar_df     %>% filter(regulation == "DOWN")          %>% pull(entrez)

tabac_mir_up    <- sig_tabac_mi %>% filter(regulation == "Upregulated")   %>% pull(geneID)
tabac_mrna_down <- tabac_df     %>% filter(regulation == "DOWN")          %>% pull(entrez)

# miRNA DOWN x mRNA UP (derepression)
cigar_mir_down  <- sig_cigar_mi %>% filter(regulation == "Downregulated") %>% pull(geneID)
cigar_mrna_up   <- cigar_df     %>% filter(regulation == "UP")            %>% pull(entrez)

tabac_mir_down  <- sig_tabac_mi %>% filter(regulation == "Downregulated") %>% pull(geneID)
tabac_mrna_up   <- tabac_df     %>% filter(regulation == "UP")            %>% pull(entrez)
```

```{r multimir}
# multiMiR function — validated interactions (miRTarBase, TarBase)
get_multimir_pairs <- function(liste_mir, liste_entrez, label) {
  if (length(liste_mir) == 0 || length(liste_entrez) == 0) {
    message("Insufficient data for: ", label)
    return(NULL)
  }
  entrez_int <- as.integer(liste_entrez)
  entrez_int <- entrez_int[!is.na(entrez_int)]

  message("multiMiR query: ", label, "...")
  res <- get_multimir(org = "mmu", mirna = liste_mir,
                      table = "validated", summary = TRUE)

  res@data %>%
    filter(target_entrez %in% entrez_int) %>%
    dplyr::select(mature_mirna_id, target_entrez, target_symbol, database, experiment) %>%
    distinct()
}

# miARN UP / ARNm DOWN
pairs_up_cigar   <- get_multimir_pairs(cigar_mir_up,   cigar_mrna_down, "Cigarette (miR UP / mRNA DOWN)")
pairs_up_tabac   <- get_multimir_pairs(tabac_mir_up,   tabac_mrna_down, "Heated tobacco (miR UP / mRNA DOWN)")

# miARN DOWN / ARNm UP
pairs_down_cigar <- get_multimir_pairs(cigar_mir_down, cigar_mrna_up,   "Cigarette (miR DOWN / mRNA UP)")
pairs_down_tabac <- get_multimir_pairs(tabac_mir_down, tabac_mrna_up,   "Heated tobacco (miR DOWN / mRNA UP)")

# Display
for (res in list(
  list(pairs_up_cigar,   "Cigarette — miR UP / mRNA DOWN"),
  list(pairs_up_tabac,   "Heated tobacco — miR UP / mRNA DOWN"),
  list(pairs_down_cigar, "Cigarette — miR DOWN / mRNA UP"),
  list(pairs_down_tabac, "Heated tobacco — miR DOWN / mRNA UP")
)) {
  cat("\n===", res[[2]], "===\n")
  if (!is.null(res[[1]]) && nrow(res[[1]]) > 0) {
    cat("Interactions found:", nrow(res[[1]]), "\n")
    print(res[[1]])
  } else {
    cat("No validated interaction found.\n")
  }
}
```

```{r export_excel}
# Multi-sheet export
wb <- createWorkbook()

sheets <- list(
  "Cig_miRUP_ARNmDOWN"  = pairs_up_cigar,
  "Tab_miRUP_ARNmDOWN"  = pairs_up_tabac,
  "Cig_miRDOWN_ARNmUP"  = pairs_down_cigar,
  "Tab_miRDOWN_ARNmUP"  = pairs_down_tabac
)

for (sheet_name in names(sheets)) {
  data <- sheets[[sheet_name]]
  if (!is.null(data) && nrow(data) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
    writeData(wb, sheet_name, data)
  }
}

saveWorkbook(wb, "Interactions_miRNA_mRNA_multiMiR.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
message("Excel export created: Interactions_miRNA_mRNA_multiMiR.xlsx")
```

# ============================================================
# 7b. miRWalk PREDICTED INTERACTIONS (seed = 1, bindingp ≥ 0.95)
# ============================================================

```{r mirwalk_predictions}
# Load miRWalk prediction files (to be placed in working directory)
cig_pred_raw <- read.csv("Interaction miR_ARNm pour Cigarette (prédiction).csv")
tab_pred_raw <- read.csv("Interaction miR_ARNm pour Tabac (prédiction).csv")

# Apply strict filters: seed = 1 and bindingp >= 0.95
cig_pred_filt <- cig_pred_raw %>%
  filter(seed == 1, bindingp >= 0.95) %>%
  filter(mirnaid %in% cigar_mir_up) %>%
  dplyr::select(mirnaid, genesymbol, bindingp, seed) %>%
  distinct()

tab_pred_filt <- tab_pred_raw %>%
  filter(seed == 1, bindingp >= 0.95) %>%
  filter(mirnaid %in% tabac_mir_up) %>%
  dplyr::select(mirnaid, genesymbol, bindingp, seed) %>%
  distinct()

cat("Cigarette — miRWalk filtered predictions:", nrow(cig_pred_filt), "interactions,",
    n_distinct(cig_pred_filt$genesymbol), "unique genes\n")
cat("Heated tobacco — miRWalk filtered predictions:", nrow(tab_pred_filt), "interactions,",
    n_distinct(tab_pred_filt$genesymbol), "unique genes\n")

# Export to Excel
wb_pred <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb_pred, "Cig_miRWalk_filtered")
writeData(wb_pred, "Cig_miRWalk_filtered", cig_pred_filt)
addWorksheet(wb_pred, "Tab_miRWalk_filtered")
writeData(wb_pred, "Tab_miRWalk_filtered", tab_pred_filt)
saveWorkbook(wb_pred, "Predictions_miRWalk_filtered.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
message("Excel export created: Predictions_miRWalk_filtered.xlsx")
```

# ============================================================
# 7c. COMMON miRNA TARGET GENES BETWEEN CONDITIONS
# ============================================================

```{r common_mirna_targets}
# Unique validated target genes per condition (all regulatory directions combined)
cig_targets_val <- unique(c(pairs_up_cigar$target_symbol, pairs_down_cigar$target_symbol))
tab_targets_val <- unique(c(pairs_up_tabac$target_symbol, pairs_down_tabac$target_symbol))

cat("Unique validated target genes — Cigarette:", length(cig_targets_val), "\n")
cat("Unique validated target genes — Heated tobacco:", length(tab_targets_val), "\n")

# Intersection (validated only)
common_targets_val <- intersect(cig_targets_val, tab_targets_val)
cat("\nCommon target genes — Validated only:", length(common_targets_val), "\n")
print(sort(common_targets_val))

# Unique predicted target genes per condition
cig_targets_pred <- unique(cig_pred_filt$genesymbol)
tab_targets_pred <- unique(tab_pred_filt$genesymbol)

# Intersection (validated + predicted)
cig_targets_all <- unique(c(cig_targets_val, cig_targets_pred))
tab_targets_all <- unique(c(tab_targets_val, tab_targets_pred))
common_targets_all <- intersect(cig_targets_all, tab_targets_all)
cat("\nCommon target genes — Validated + Predicted:", length(common_targets_all), "\n")
print(sort(common_targets_all))
```

# ============================================================
# 8. SESSION INFORMATION
# ============================================================

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
